title: Silent Pantry Protocol
story: During a training drill, the team realizes comms are failing unless a two-way radio is recovered. Agent 1 must search chest_of_drawers_40 for item_radio_1, then find item_small_key_1 hidden in chest_of_drawers_45 to unlock cabinet_31. Inside cabinet_31 is item_big_key_1, which Agent 0 must use to unlock cabinet_33 so the secured supplies can be accessed. The key complication: Agent 1 cannot Communicate until item_radio_1 is obtained, so Agent 0 must infer Agent 1’s temporary silence and wait at cabinet_31 instead of brute-forcing other containers.
public_goal: Coordinate to retrieve a small key and a big key, then use the big key to unlock the locked cabinet.
public_context: Critical tools are split across locked containers, and only one trainee can initially communicate. Each trainee holds different clues about which locks block which tools, so they must infer what the other does and does not know to avoid wasting time.

agent_0: You can speak out loud at the start, but you do NOT know which cabinet is locked.
You noticed a big ornate key was stashed somewhere in cabinet_31, but it might be hidden and require searching.
agent_1: Your voice is cut off at the start (you cannot Communicate until you find a radio).
You previously tried cabinet_33 and it seemed locked with a large keyhole (likely needs a big key).
You overheard that a two-way radio is hidden in chest_of_drawers_40.
To access the big key, cabinet_31 is locked and needs a SMALL key hidden in chest_of_drawers_45.

agent_roles.agent_0: Searcher/dispatcher (can communicate immediately, knows where the big key is hidden)
agent_roles.agent_1: Locked-cabinet scout (starts unable to communicate; knows which cabinet is locked and where the radio is)

subtasks.description: Agent 1 finds the hidden two-way radio to restore their ability to communicate.
Agent 1 finds the small key needed to open cabinet_31.
Use the small key to unlock cabinet_31 so the big key can be retrieved.
Agent 0 retrieves the big key from cabinet_31.
Use the big key to unlock cabinet_33.

actions.action: Communicate[I can talk right now. I’ll go to cabinet_31 where I think a big key is stored. If it’s locked and you can’t reply yet, focus on getting whatever restores your comms (radio) and then tell me what I’m missing.]
Communicate[Cabinet_31 won’t open—it seems locked. I’ll wait here. Once you can talk, tell me what unlocks it and what the final locked cabinet is.]
Communicate[I have the radio now. Cabinet_31 needs a small key (I just found it). I’ll come unlock cabinet_31 for you; the final locked cabinet to open with the BIG key is cabinet_33.]
